---
title: "Mi informe"
author: "ElenaQB"
data: 06-05-2026
format: typst
---

# Mi informe del dataset Nigro et al.

```{r }
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
#| label: paquetes
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
dt <- read_csv(here("data/data_clean.csv"))
```

## Figuras

La media de frutos general es `r mean(dt$count, na.rm = TRUE)`.

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Figura 1: plot"
ggplot(dt, aes(y = count, x = year)) + 
  geom_point()
```
